title: FMD - Both earbuds disconnected
scenario: Find My Device map shows all Voyager Free 60+ devices (Case, Left, Right) as disconnected, and Voyager Free 20 shows only earbuds (no case) both disconnected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the Find My Device feature
Select Poly Voyager Free 60 Series (Osprey) from the device list
Observe the map view showing device locations
Note the status indicators for Case, Left earbud, and Right earbud
Return to device list and select Poly Voyager Free 20 (Tern)
Observe the map view showing device locations
Note the status indicators for Left earbud and Right earbud
expected: For Poly Voyager Free 60 Series (Osprey): All three devices (Case, Left earbud, Right earbud) should show as connected or at least display their last known location/status properly. For Poly Voyager Free 20 (Tern): The Case should be shown alongside the two earbuds, and all devices should display their connection status correctly.
